_comment: All trades + EOD snapshots. The day_0_baseline is the starting reference for cumulative P&L math. Each EOD snapshot under daily_snapshots is required for next-day day-over-day calculations.

day_0_baseline.note: Day 0 baseline — bot becomes active Monday 2026-05-11.

weekly_trade_count._comment: Resets every Monday 00:00 ET. Used to enforce max-3-trades-per-week rule.

confidence_calibration._comment: predicted-confidence-bucket -> {sample_size, wins, losses}. Empty until we have closed trades.

daily_snapshots.notes: No positions, no trades. Day-trade close step had nothing to close. NVDA swing approval flipped to STALE (price outran entry zone, no fresh scan since 2026-05-09). MSFT mean-reversion idea carried forward to 2026-05-14 pre-market. Infra: ta package failed to install in routine sandbox; research.py scan unavailable this run. Journal continuity gap — no entries for 2026-05-11 or 2026-05-12.

confidence_calibration._comment: predicted-confidence-bucket -> {sample_size, wins, losses}. Empty until we have closed trades.

daily_snapshots.notes: No positions, no trades. Day-trade close step had nothing to close. Scheduler gap confirmed as a pattern: only the EOD routine fired on 5/13 and 5/14 — pre-market, market-open, midday, and the dispatcher did not run on 5/14 (last_poll.json last_poll_at still null; open_positions.md still carried the unprocessed 2026-05-14 pre-market block). NVDA setup never re-evaluated, still STALE. MSFT formal proposal now 3 trading days overdue. Infra: ta package still fails wheel build, aborting the whole pip batch install; worked around by installing other deps individually. research.py scan unavailable for the 4th consecutive day.
